pull_request.title: Bump the openrewrite group with 6 updates
pull_request.body:
Bumps the openrewrite group with 6 updates: | Package | From | To | | --- | --- | --- | | [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) | `8.74.0` | `8.74.1` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks) | `3.27.0` | `3.28.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java) | `3.27.1` | `3.28.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis) | `2.27.0` | `2.28.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-joda](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-joda) | `0.6.2` | `0.7.0` | | [org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin) | `6.29.0` | `6.30.0` | Updates `org.openrewrite:rewrite-java` from 8.74.0 to 8.74.1
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java's releases.

8.74.1

What's Changed

  • Python: Fix ty 0.0.18 type checking diagnostics by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6806
  • Handle null class body in KotlinPrinter by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6805
  • Normalize ANTLR generated code by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6807
  • Normalize ANTLR generated code - continued by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6808
  • Python: Support ternary comparisons in PatternMatchingComparator by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6809
  • Make DeclarativeRecipe.accumulator thread-safe with ThreadLocal by @​kmccarp in openrewrite/rewrite#6810
  • Skip AddAnnotationProcessor when processor already in effective POM via ancestor by @​mcebanupgrade in openrewrite/rewrite#6759
  • Python: Fix tuple parsing for parenthesized element with trailing comma by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6811
  • Python: Handle RPC deserialization errors in PythonRewriteRpc#parseProject() by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6812
  • Python: Fix pattern matching false positives and add template auto-parenthesization by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6814
  • Python: Pin openrewrite Python package version in RPC bootstrap by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6813
  • Python: register all existing recipes by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6815

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.74.0...v8.74.1

Commits
  • 602ec88 Register all existing recipes (#6815)
  • 02c48a7 Python: Pin openrewrite Python package version in RPC bootstrap (#6813)
  • 9416341 Python: Fix pattern matching false positives and add template auto-parenthesi...
  • e7f8710 Handle RPC deserialization errors in PythonRewriteRpc#parseProject() (#6812)
  • 35854f8 Python: Fix tuple parsing for parenthesized element with trailing comma outsi...
  • b8da3dd Use identity hash code due to overridden hashCode in Recipe
  • 56da100 Make Singleton safe to cache
  • 0d790f5 Skip AddAnnotationProcessor when processor already in effective POM via ances...
  • 447d382 Make DeclarativeRecipe.accumulator thread-safe with ThreadLocal (#6810)
  • 15ebbf2 Python: Support ternary comparisons in PatternMatchingComparator (#6809)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks` from 3.27.0 to 3.28.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks's releases.

3.28.0

What's Changed

  • Fix 6 issues in AssertJ recipe migrations by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#911
  • Preserve throws clause when checked exceptions exist outside assertThrows. by @​motlin in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#899
  • Pin AssertJ to stable 3.27.7 by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#913
  • Add .contextSensitive() to Hamcrest conversion templates and improve type matching in CollapseConsecutiveAssertThatStatements by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#912
  • Fix 2 AssertJ migration recipe issues found via large-scale validation by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#914
  • Add Hamcrest to AssertJ recipes for hasProperty, everyItem, and hasItem(Matcher) by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#916
  • Add missing Hamcrest not(Matcher) to AssertJ conversions by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#917
  • Do not incorrectly strip method calls from assertion arguments by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#918

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks/compare/v3.27.0...v3.28.0

Commits
  • c2860b4 OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • c75ba77 Do not incorrectly strip method calls from assertion arguments (#918)
  • bf27539 Add missing Hamcrest not(Matcher) to AssertJ conversions (#866) (#917)
  • 4f3f340 Update Gradle wrapper to 9.3.1
  • a850e44 Add Hamcrest to AssertJ recipes for hasProperty, everyItem, and hasItem(Match...
  • 16f1501 Fix 2 AssertJ migration recipe issues found via large-scale validation (#914)
  • c270c74 Add .contextSensitive() to Hamcrest conversion templates and improve type mat...
  • 00bc57f Pin AssertJ to stable 3.27.7 (#913)
  • 36ebbba Preserve throws clause when checked exceptions exist outside assertThrows. (#...
  • 58d2238 OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java` from 3.27.1 to 3.28.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java's releases.

3.28.0

What's Changed

  • Add maven-compiler-plugin version when missing during Java migration by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#989
  • UpdateSdkMan recipe to support newJavaVersion=latest.patch by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#990
  • Fix UpdateSdkManTest to use current SDKMAN Java versions by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#991

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java/compare/v3.27.1...v3.28.0

Commits
  • f5a2bd8 Update Gradle wrapper to 9.3.1
  • 0b2cb73 Fix UpdateSdkManTest to use current SDKMAN Java versions (#991)
  • 7c8b223 [Auto] SDKMAN! Java candidates as of 2026-02-23T1044
  • e750f1b OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • f30e774 Update SDKMan Java version
  • 626e34f UpdateSdkMan recipe to support newJavaVersion=latest.patch (#990)
  • 32b8caa OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • c17f866 Add maven-compiler-plugin version when missing during Java migration (#989)
  • See full diff in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis` from 2.27.0 to 2.28.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis's releases.

2.28.0

What's Changed

  • CLAUDE instructions: Do not add to common-static-analysis.yml by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#818
  • Regenerate recipes.csv to fix CI by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#820
  • RemoveTrailingWhitespace recipe by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#819
  • SimplifyForLoopBoundaryComparison recipe by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#821

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis/compare/v2.27.0...v2.28.0

Commits
  • f332ad0 Add missing import
  • 8ee9ffc OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • ab55f8e SimplifyForLoopBoundaryComparison recipe (#821)
  • 276ee4e RemoveTrailingWhitespace recipe (#819)
  • 38704bd Update Gradle wrapper to 9.3.1
  • 70fe161 Regenerate recipes.csv to include InlineDeprecatedMethods (#820)
  • 98c28e4 Do not add to common-static-analysis.yml (#818)
  • 08bddd8 OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • 69d43a5 Remove newly redundant CustomImportOrder in favor of OrderImports.
  • See full diff in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-joda` from 0.6.2 to 0.7.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-joda's releases.

0.7.0

What's Changed

  • Decompose Joda-Time recipe into YAML-composed declarative recipes by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-joda#17
  • Add JodaTimePeriodToJavaTime recipe by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-joda#18
  • OpenRewrite recipe best practices by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite-joda#19

New Contributors

  • @​greg-at-moderne made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite-joda#19

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-joda/compare/v0.6.2...v0.7.0

Commits
  • 2e948db Update Gradle wrapper to 9.3.1
  • d0d55c1 OpenRewrite recipe best practices (#19)
  • af7dcdf OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • 2cf7ad1 Add JodaTimePeriodToJavaTime recipe for Days/Hours/Minutes/Seconds (#18)
  • 8cd71be Decompose Joda-Time recipe into YAML-composed declarative recipes (#17)
  • See full diff in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin` from 6.29.0 to 6.30.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin's releases.

6.30.0

What's Changed

  • Add integration test for JDK 25 Lombok LinkageError by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin#1109
  • chore(ci): bump org.junit:junit-bom from 6.0.2 to 6.0.3 by @​dependabot[bot] in openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin#1111
  • chore(ci): bump io.micrometer:micrometer-core from 1.16.2 to 1.16.3 by @​dependabot[bot] in openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin#1112
  • chore(ci): bump org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-failsafe-plugin from 3.5.4 to 3.5.5 by @​dependabot[bot] in openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin#1114
  • Add generateRecipeCsv goal by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin#1113

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin/compare/v6.29.0...v6.30.0

Commits
  • a131783 [maven-release-plugin] prepare release v6.30.0
  • 319a5e7 Bump rewrite.version property
  • ab0a77a Add generateRecipeCsv goal (#1113)
  • be51df2 chore(ci): bump org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-failsafe-plugin (#1114)
  • fc41141 Update SDKMan Java version
  • d09e235 chore(ci): bump io.micrometer:micrometer-core from 1.16.2 to 1.16.3 (#1112)
  • 99164e9 chore(ci): bump org.junit:junit-bom from 6.0.2 to 6.0.3 (#1111)
  • 3ba6e5a Add integration test for JDK 25 LinkageError with Lombok (#1109)
  • b5138fc Bump rewrite.version property
  • 487a4e4 Bump rewrite.version property
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

You can trigger a rebase of this PR by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore major version` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency's major version (unless you unignore this specific dependency's major version or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore minor version` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency's minor version (unless you unignore this specific dependency's minor version or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore ` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency (unless you unignore this specific dependency or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot unignore ` will remove all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot unignore ` will remove the ignore condition of the specified dependency and ignore conditions
